consumer, pinned dogfood, or detached source-local dev

intent + packet quality + execution posture
plus architecture dossier execution hint when applicable

Emit disjoint leaves
fan-out caps enforced

span.p:
Per-leaf Odylith execution profile
scope role + readiness + utility + merge burden
plus architecture mode / fanout / risk / confidence
while preserving runtime-backed source provenance
and the compact control-advisory contract

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Per-leaf model + reasoning selection
plus task-class policy baseline

display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Collapse to local_only
rescope in main thread

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Execution plan returned to main thread
owner + goal + expected_output + termination_condition
plus native spawn/close payloads

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Main thread spawns leaves
serial or parallel as planned
with route_spawn_agent_overrides
and route_close_agent_overrides

span.p:

final validation, and adjudication
